languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

languages.text: "Хм... если надумаешь выслеживать нелюдь — кинь клич, ищейка. Подлая тварь прячется, зная, что по ее следу идут сыны Императора, но от моего нюха ей не укрыться".

"Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

"Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

languages.text: 「うーん…もしもその非人間を狩る決意をしたなら、そう言え。その卑劣なものは、天皇の皇子たちがその追跡をしていることを知って隠れているが、その臭いは私には隠せない」
languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…もしもその非人間を狩る決意をしたなら、血hound、その言葉を言え。その卑劣なものは、天皇の皇子たちがその追跡をしていることを知って隠れているが、その臭いは私には隠せない。」

languages.text: « Hmm... Si jamais vous décidez de traquer ce non-humain, faites-le-moi savoir, cerbère. Cette vile créature s'est terrée quelque part, sachant que les fils de l'Empereur sont à ses trousses, mais elle ne peut pas me cacher son odeur. »
languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

traits.locale_text: « Hmm... Si jamais vous décidez de traquer ce non-humain, faites-le-moi savoir, cerbère. Cette vile créature s'est terrée quelque part, sachant que les fils de l'Empereur sont à ses trousses, mais elle ne peut pas me cacher son odeur. »

languages.text: "Hmm ... solltet Ihr je beschließen, diesen Nicht-Menschen zu jagen, sagt Bescheid, Bluthund. Der Halunke versteckt sich, weil er weiß, dass ihm die Söhne des Imperators auf der Spur sind, aber vor mir kann er seine Witterung nicht verbergen."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... solltet Ihr je beschließen, diesen Nicht-Menschen zu jagen, sagt Bescheid, Bluthund. Der Halunke versteckt sich, weil er weiß, dass ihm die Söhne des Imperators auf der Spur sind, aber vor mir kann er seine Witterung nicht verbergen."

languages.text: "Hım... Eğer o insanlık dışı yaratığı avlamaya karar verirsen söylemen yeterli kan tazısı. Adi yaratık, İmparator'un evlatlarının peşinde olduğunu bilerek kendini gizliyor. Oysa kokusunu benden saklayamaz."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

traits.locale_text: "Hım... Eğer o insanlık dışı yaratığı avlamaya karar verirsen söylemen yeterli kan tazısı. Adi yaratık, İmparator'un evlatlarının peşinde olduğunu bilerek kendini gizliyor. Oysa kokusunu benden saklayamaz."

languages.text: «Hum... Si alguna vez decide dar caza a esa criatura inhumana, no tiene más que decirlo, sabueso. Esa aberración se esconde porque sabe que los hijos del Emperador están siguiendo su pista, pero a mí no me puede ocultar su rastro».
languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."

traits.locale_text: «Hum... Si alguna vez decide dar caza a esa criatura inhumana, no tiene más que decirlo, sabueso. Esa aberración se esconde porque sabe que los hijos del Emperador están siguiendo su pista, pero a mí no me puede ocultar su rastro».

languages.text: “嗯……若你哪天决意追捕那头非人之物，知会一声便是，猎犬。那肮脏玩意儿知道帝皇子嗣正循迹而来。它虽会躲藏，但它的气味可逃不过我的鼻子。”
languages.original_text: "Hmm... if you ever decide to hunt down that inhuman, say the word, bloodhound. The vile thing conceals itself, knowing that the Emperor's sons are on its trail, but it cannot hide its scent from me."
